reply: (1) This is an AutomationDirect GS10 Variable Frequency Drive, used to control motor speed. (2) The most likely cause is a power dip during the thunderstorm, which could have caused a drive to reset or malfunction. (3) The tech should check the input voltage and ensure the drive is properly grounded. For an unknown fault, the tech should consult the manual or seek technical support for troubleshooting.
